arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Chelsea prepare summe spending spree, Man City chase Wirtz signing
arts.sum: The January transfer window is now little more than a distant memory in European football and as such clubs across the continent are already making plans for the summer window. Teams are working...

arts.ttl: Retegui chasing Salah for European Golden Boot: Beating Kane and Lewandowski
arts.sum: Italy international Mateo Retegui is currently second behind Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah in the race...

arts.ttl: Man United and Arsenal have been told how they can sign Harry Kane this summer
arts.sum: Manchester United and Arsenal are both looking to sign a new attacker in the summer who can lead their attack next season. The 1-1 draw at Old Trafford, in which midfielders scored goals for both the teams, once again proved the need for a new attacker. Both Ruben Amorim and Mikel Arteta are struggling in […] The post Man United and Arsenal have been told how they can sign Harry Kane this summer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: History made as Bayern Munich, Borussia Dortmund and Bayer Leverkusen lose at home on same matchday
arts.sum: History was made this weekend as Bayern Munich, Borussia Dortmund and Bayer Leverkusen all lost at home on the same matchday for the first time in Bundesliga history. As a result, this weekend made Bundesliga history as Bayern, Dortmund and Leverkusen had never previously been beaten on home over the same matchday of a season.

arts.ttl: Florian Wirtz injury latest: Verdict expected in 24 hours as Man City, Real Madrid monitor situation
arts.sum: This could have implications on the summer transfer market as Wirtz was expected to be one of the major protagonists. Wirtz has already suffered a serious knee injury previously in his career, and there are fears that this blow could see his season ended after he left the stadium on crutches on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich has two priorities ahead of pursuit for Bournemouth’s Dean Huijsen; Who was Bayern scouting at Paris Saint-Germain vs. Liverpool in the Champions League?; Max Eberl talks Thomas Müller’s future; and MORE!
arts.sum: A host of clubs, including Real Madrid and Bayern Munich, had observers watching Virgil van Dijk in action for Liverpool against PSG. According to a report from Sky Sport journalist Florian Plettenberg, Bayern Munich finds Bournemouth center-back Dean Huijsen to be “interesting”, which we kind of already knew.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works S7E33: Unpacking Bayern Munich’s loss to VfL Bochum; What does €80 million buy you these days?; Were there winners and losers from the Joshua Kimmich saga?; and MORE!
arts.sum: In addition, in a weekend rife with upsets in the Bundesliga, the loss to VfL Bochum did not end up hurting Bayern Munich too much in the league table. Unpacking Bayern Munich’s loss to VfL Bochum.

arts.ttl: Josep Guardiola, José Mourinho, Florentino Perez offer their thoughts on Bayern Munich on day of 125th anniversary
arts.sum: On the occasion of the 125th anniversary, I would like to express my admiration and respect to FC Bayern - for your legendary history and your contribution to making football such a valued sport around the world.” “On behalf of Real Madrid, I would like to congratulate FC Bayern on this special anniversary.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz has “slim” chance of facing Bayern Munich
arts.sum: According to a report from Kölner Stadt-Anzeiger (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayer Leverkusen ace Florian Wirtz is in major doubt to face Bayern Munich on Tuesday in the Champions League : Does Bayer Leverkusen have any chance to comeback against Bayern Munich without its best player?

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala unfazed and unbothered by who Bayern Munich legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge thinks is Germany’s best
arts.sum: Over the past week, one of the biggest controversies surrounding Bayern Munich has developed around club legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge saying that Bayer Leverkusen ace Florian Wirtz is the top player in Germany. With Wirtz having an abysmal performance during Bayer Leverkusen’s 3-0 loss to Bayern Munich in the Champions League and Musiala being sensational for the Bavarians, it was only natural that the Bayern Munich star was asked about Rummenigge’s statements after the match.
